name: Knotwork Bridge
description: Plugin-first handshake, agent sync, and task execution bridge from OpenClaw to Knotwork.
author: Knotwork

knotworkBaseUrl.description: Knotwork server base URL reachable from OpenClaw runtime (example: http://host.docker.internal:8000).

handshakeToken.description: Pairing token generated in Knotwork Settings > Agents. Used for initial handshake and credential recovery.

pluginInstanceId.description: Stable plugin instance id. If omitted, plugin generates one.

autoHandshakeOnStart.description: If true, the primary long-running plugin runtime handshakes automatically on startup.
